protein_name: Catalyzes N-terminal palmitoylation of SHH; which is required for SHH signaling. May bind GTP. Belongs to the membrane-bound acyltransferase family. HHAT subfamily. Ubiquitously expressed in normal tissues and cancer cell lines. 7 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: positive regulation of smoothened signaling pathway; protein maturation; protein modification process
